output: Executed batch 3 task T3 in `AgentChat.tsx`. task_updates.executor_notes: Added the queue-drain `useEffect` in `src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx`. It now exits while a send is in flight, the agent is processing, the mutation is pending, an optimistic message is still active, the queue is empty, or there is no active session/timeline. When idle, it reads `queue[0]`, awaits `sendNow(next)`, and only then removes the head with a `prev[0]?.id === next.id ? prev.slice(1) : prev` guard so failed sends remain visible and reorder races do not drop the wrong item. Verification: `npx eslint src/tools/video-editor/components/AgentChat/AgentChat.tsx` passes. `npm test -- AgentChat` still fails on the pre-existing Router issue in `AgentChat.test.tsx` where `useLocation()` is called outside a Router.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The drain effect awaits `sendNow(next)` before slicing the queue, uses `prev[0]?.id === next.id` when removing the head, leaves failed items at the front by catching without slicing, and will naturally re-fire once `optimisticMessage` clears because that state is in the dependency list and the early-return guard.
